case_title: REYNOLDS GLORIA DBA REYNOLDS ASSOCIATES VS EGAN WILLIAM IND/DBA DAK SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY REYNOLDS GLORIA DBA REYNOLDS ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT EGAN WILLIAM IND/DBA DAK SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
